title: Making Freezing Solution
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"601je","text":"The freezing solution can be made in advance and stored in sterile containers at room temperature till needed.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Make 0.05M K 2 HPO 4 by dissolving 8.71g of K 2 HPO 4 in 1L of DIW
Make 0.05M KH 2 PO 4 by dissolving 6.80g of KH 2 PO 4 in 1L of DIW
Make S Buffer solution by adding the following: 129 ml 0.05 M K 2 HPO 4 871 ml 0.05 M KH 2 PO 4 5.85 g NaCl
Make the freezing solution by adding the S buffer to 30% glycerol (v/v): Just add 700ml of S buffer to 300ml of glycerol to get the desired concentration
Autoclave the mixture. (Aliquoting first is not advised due to handling issues upon adding glycerol)
After autoclaving, aliquot into sterile 200ml bottles labelled with the name and date of the solution prepared.
Before using the freezing solution always check the bottle for any growth/contaminants
Discard the bottle if you see any contaminants and open a new one
Aliquot into falcon tubes from 200ml bottles to reduce contamination. Discard the tube after freezing do not put the contents back to the 200ml bottle!
creator: Priota Islam
